After taking the lift, go up the stairs on the left for a Smithing Stone [2].
To the left of a tree at the southwest end of the area is a corpse with Smithing Stone [1] x3.
Pick up Fire Grease x2 from a ledge next to the mound of corpses in the courtyard.
Enter the room accessible from the ledge for a chest by the entrance containing the Claymore.
Go down the stairs and climb the ladder. On the rampart you'll find a Furlcalling Finger Remedy and the Steel-Wire Torch.
Climb the ladder on the rampart, then drop down for a Golden Rune [2] hanging off the edge of a bridge.
On the right side past the bridge is a ladder that leads to a corpse with Smithing Stone [2] x2.
Descend the ladder on the left side past the bridge for a Golden Rune [2] near the clashing enemies.
Go up the wooden stairs and talk to Edgar to receive a Sacrificial Twig, then deliver him Irina's Letter.
Head back down and step on the brick rubble at the end of the rampart, then jump over the fence to grab the Behind the Castle grace.
Drop to the top of a rampart, then drop down southwest to land on a wooden platform with a Stonesword Key.
Enter the room below to find a corpse with Pickled Turtle Neck.
Climb the ladder across the bridge for a chest containing the Twinblade Talisman.
Drop onto the rooftop below the bridge and pick up the Tarnished Golden Sunflower x3 next to a tree.
Continue down until you reach a castle platform, then drop onto a wooden beam down the hole to pick up Smithing Stone [2].
In the room at the bottom sits a corpse with the Whip.
Turn left outside the room to discover the Beside the Rampart Gaol grace.
Cross the wooden bridge to pick up Throwing Dagger x8.
Descend the ladder, then head around the side of the structure to find a Somber Smithing Stone [1].
In the narrow passage north-northeast of the ladder is a corpse with Fire Arrow x15.
🏆 Kill Leonine Misbegotten for Grafted Blade Greatsword and 3,800 runes.
Optional: Edgar's summon sign can be found outside the entrance if you gave him Irina's Letter.
There are no items in the arena, so go ahead and activate the Morne Moangrave grace.
Optional: Return to Edgar and exhaust his dialogue.
Travel to the Bridge of Sacrifice and talk to Edgar beside Irina's corpse.
